findings.description: The 'もう少し詳しく！' sidebar listing the 5 cost categories (売上原価, 販管費, 営業外費用, 特別損失, 法人税等) is not captured as an entity. This is supplementary callout content; core concepts are covered by the table entity.

The waterfall is encoded as a table with 'Stage / Profit / Deduction / Amount' columns. The column header '控除項目' for 営業外損益 and 特別損益 could be misleading since those can be gains (損益 = P/L, not pure deductions). The representation is a reasonable approximation but slightly over-simplifies the bidirectional nature of 営業外損益 and 特別損益.

reviewer_notes: The replaced entity (table encoding the 5-profit waterfall cascade) accurately represents the image: all 5 cascade steps are present with correct profit names, deduction names, and amounts (100→70/30→50/20→40/10→35/5→25/10). The three term entities (キャッシュフロー計算書, 黒字倒産, 売掛金) match the visible page text faithfully. The only omissions are the supplementary sidebar callout (low severity) and a minor conceptual imprecision in labeling 営業外損益/特別損益 as 控除項目 when they can be gains. No high-severity findings.
